id.description: Unique ID of the time entry.

agent_id.description: ID of the agent who logged the time.

billable.description: Whether the time entry is billable.

executed_at.description: Timestamp when the work was executed.

start_time.description: Start time of the time entry.

time_spent.description: Duration of time spent in HH:MM format.

timer_running.description: Whether the timer is currently running.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the time entry was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the time entry was last updated.
